meta.description: Daily: read the company's compliance gates via MCP; if any are still open/in_progress, raise an IN-APP notification for the ops lead via the hub `notify` tool (no external channel). Scoped identity wf:compliance-gate-nag -> [compliance.gates, llm.summarize, notify]; the platform gates the read + notify to company_admin (the service account is granted that role). Env: HUB_SERVICE_TOKEN, AGENCY_TENANT_ID, NOTIFY_USER_ID.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id: 1, method: "tools/call", params: { name: "compliance.gates", arguments: { tenantId: $env.AGENCY_TENANT_ID } } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id: 1, method: "tools/call", params: { name: "notify", arguments: { tenantId: $env.AGENCY_TENANT_ID, recipientId: $env.NOTIFY_USER_ID, type: "compliance_gates_open", payload: { count: $json.count, keys: $json.keys } } } }) }}
